memoryArtifacts.headline: Våbenskjold
memoryArtifacts.description: Slægtens våben var en oprejst sølv-leopard i blåt felt og en halv leopard på hjelmen. I grev Ernsts sigil fra 1257, det ældste som kendes, er leoparden uden krone, men alt i grev Henriks fra år 1300 e …

zh.lifeSummary: Ernst IV von Gleichen是Lambert II Erwinson von Gleichen和Gräfin Sofie von Orlamuende的兒子，出生。他於大約1220年與Ingeborg Pedersdatter Strange在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 馬布格結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1259年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ernst IV von Gleichen是Lambert II Erwinson von Gleichen和Gräfin Sofie von Orlamuende的儿子，出生。他于大约1220年与Ingeborg Pedersdatter Strange在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 馬布格结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1259年之后。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gleichen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: occupational name for an iron worker who flattened out the metal into sheets, from an agent derivative of Middle High German gelīchen ‘to smooth or even out’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the inflected form of German gleich ‘same’, one of names from vocabulary words that were selected at random by government officials when surnames were made compulsory.

nameMeanings.name: Ernst
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from ern(e)st ‘serious business, fight to the death’.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably a contracted form of  Jep , vernacular form of   Jacob   .

en.lifeSummary: Ernst IV von Gleichen was born as the son of Lambert II Erwinson von Gleichen and Gräfin Sofie von Orlamuende. He married Ingeborg Pedersdatter Strange about 1220, in Marburg, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died after 1259.

de.lifeSummary: Ernst IV von Gleichen wurde, als Sohn von Lambert II Erwinson von Gleichen und Gräfin Sofie von Orlamuende geboren. Er hat um 1220 in Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland Ingeborg Pedersdatter Strange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb nach 1259.

it.lifeSummary: Ernst IV von Gleichen è nato il come figlio di Lambert II Erwinson von Gleichen e Gräfin Sofie von Orlamuende. Lui sposato Ingeborg Pedersdatter Strange circa 1220, nel Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1259.

ja.lifeSummary: Ernst IV von GleichenはLambert II Erwinson von GleichenとGräfin Sofie von Orlamuendeの息子として生まれた。約1220年にドイツプレウssンヘセン-ナッサウクレイス マルブルグでIngeborg Pedersdatter Strangeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1259年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ernst IV von Gleichen(은)는 Lambert II Erwinson von Gleichen(와)과 Gräfin Sofie von Orlamuende의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1220년 독일 프레우ss 헤센-나소 크레이스 마버그에서 Ingeborg Pedersdatter Strange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1259년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ernst IV von Gleichen nasceu filho de Lambert II Erwinson von Gleichen e Gräfin Sofie von Orlamuende. Ele casou-se com Ingeborg Pedersdatter Strange aproximadamente 1220, em Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1259.

ru.lifeSummary: Ernst IV von Gleichen родился. Его родителей звали Lambert II Erwinson von Gleichen и Gräfin Sofie von Orlamuende. Он женился на женщине по имени Ingeborg Pedersdatter Strange около 1220 г. в местности крис марбург, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер после 1259 г.
